emails.subject: Re: IEEE Standards For Interconnection
emails.body: Re: IEEE Standards For Interconnection I assume you are referring to the IEEE effort to develop a standard for the interconnection of distributed resources (IEEE P1547). I was following this development but have since reduced my efforts in this area. The status is that they are working to get an approved standard released in the 3rd quarter of 2001. Janine Migden 11/29/2000 04:48 PM

emails.subject: Re: IEEE Standards For Interconnection
emails.body: YEs, I think so. If the Ohio utilities agree to defer to the IEEE standards once they are approved, is that good for us? What is our view on this? Thanks Tom Hoatson 11/30/2000 09:58 AM
